title: loom.lifecycle.phase v1
description: Agent-internal phase transitions during a loomie execution — what the agent inside the container is doing (e.g. exploring repo, implementing, committing). Distinct from loom.lifecycle.v1, which models the executor/container-level lifecycle (queued, container_init, agent_active, gates, complete). This event fires INSIDE the agent_active phase as the agent moves through its workflow. Source: /hearth-loom/agent.

task_id.description: Bead id this task is executing

execution_id.description: UUID v4 — correlates to loom.lifecycle.v1 execution

previous_phase.description: Phase the agent transitioned from; null on first transition

phase_at.description: RFC3339 UTC — when this phase began

title.description: Human-readable task title from the bead (truncated to 120 chars)
